title: Hypixelized
description: A PvP Modpack designed to significantly enhance your Quality of Life when playing Hypixel's Minigames like Bedwars, Skywars, Duels etc.
body:
![Banner for the modpack ‘Hypixelized’, featuring the modpack’s branding in the foreground and a Hypixel lobby scene in the background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2491814f710944881d39a3fbf0c10590234e6b8.webp)

✨ What the project specifically does or adds

**Hypixelized** is a Modpack that well... obviously aims to **improve** your experience on **Hypixel**. It's bundled with lots of **PvP** and **QOL** Mods that make your gameplay **smoother** and more **enjoyable**. It's not only focusing on **Bedwars** - it's also made with **Skywars**, **Survivalgames**, **Duels**, **Murder Mystery** etc. in mind! With the help of [**Polyfrost's**](https://polyfrost.org) _amazing_ [**OneConfig Mod**](https://polyfrost.org/projects/oneconfig/) _(go check them out!!)_, you can easily manage almost every mod using the Mod Menu (R-SHIFT).

💡 Why someone should want to download the project

- More **customizability** - You can add your **own** cool mods - **Free** cosmetics (yippie!) - It has **more features** than most popular clients I think (holy macaroni, I didn't even know that there were this many cool 1.8.9 mods)

⚠️ Any other critical information the user must know before downloading

- There are very cool settings in **PolyPatcher** - The most common GUI elements like CPS, ArmorHud, Coordinates etc. are in the **EverGreenHUD** section - Install flippin' [**OptiFine**](https://optifine.net) please!!

💬 You want me to remove your mod?

No problem at all! Just message me on Discord (Username: "kolpix") or mail me at `contact@kolpix.de`

FAQ

Where can I disable the Hurtcam? In **OverflowAnimations**
How can I equip cosmetics? You can browse and equip Cosmetics on [https://login.cosmetica.cc/microsoft-java](https://login.cosmetica.cc/microsoft-java)
Where is OptiFine? I can't put it in this Modpack without permission. Just install it manually from [**Optifine's website**](https://optifine.net)
Can you add Mod xyz Suggest it on the [**Discord Server**](https://discord.gg/SQKW5kdnQ4)
Why does my game crash?? Idk. Get some help on the [**Discord Server**](https://discord.gg/SQKW5kdnQ4) or just don't play with the Modpack.
Any alternatives? Yeah ofc. I highly recommend using [**SkyClient**](https://skyclient.co/). It's an **amazing**, **open-source** Hypixel-oriented Forge mod and pack installer. [**Skyblocker Modpack**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/skyblocker-modpack) by [**Wohlhabend**](https://modrinth.com/user/Wohlhabend), [**Kevinthegreat**](https://modrinth.com/user/Kevinthegreat) & [**TacoMonkey**](https://modrinth.com/user/TacoMonkey) is an amazing modpack if you play Skyblock. You'll also find more Hypixel-oriented Modpacks on Modrinth & CurseForge by searching for keywords like **Hypixel** or **Bedwars**.
